description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Order the cheapest medium bamboo cutting board under $60 with a family name engraving
tasks.description: Find a medium-sized bamboo cutting board in the Kitchen category, filter to prices under $60, sort by lowest price, and configure the cheapest option with the family name 'The Johnson Family' before adding 1 item to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation menu item labeled 'Kitchen & Cutting Boards'.
On the category page, open the 'Material' filter section and select the 'Bamboo' checkbox.
Open the 'Size' filter section and select the 'Medium (12 x 16 in)' option.
Find the price filter, enter '60' into the maximum price field, and apply the filter to limit items to $60 or less.
Open the sort dropdown and choose the 'Price: Low to High' sorting option.
From the sorted product list, click on the first cutting board product card displayed.
On the product detail page, locate the engraving text field and type 'The Johnson Family' into it.
In the font or style selector, choose the 'Script 2' option.
If the quantity field does not already show '1', type '1' into the quantity field, then click the 'Add to Cart' button.

tasks.name: Configure a set of 4 engraved stainless steel tumblers with the cheapest shipping under 10 business days
tasks.description: Find stainless steel 20 oz tumblers under $35 with a rating of 4+ stars, choose the cheapest option, customize it with a team engraving, set quantity to 4, and select the least expensive shipping method that delivers within 10 business days before adding to cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation category labeled 'Drinkware & Tumblers'.
On the category page, open the 'Material' filter and select 'Stainless Steel', then open the 'Capacity' filter and select '20 oz'.
In the price filter, type '35' into the maximum price box to show tumblers priced at $35 or less.
In the rating filter, select '4 stars & up' to limit results to higher-rated products.
Use the sort dropdown to select 'Price: Low to High', then click on the first tumbler product in the list.
On the tumbler product page, choose the color option 'Black' from the available color swatches or dropdown.
Set the quantity field to '4' so that four tumblers will be ordered.
In the engraving or personalization text box, type 'Team Phoenix • 2026' as the engraving message.
Scroll to the shipping options section, select the lowest-priced shipping option that indicates delivery within 10 business days, and then click the 'Add to Cart' button.

tasks.name: Choose the higher-rated engraved phone stand in walnut or maple under $40 and add it to cart
tasks.description: Search for engraved phone stands under $40 in walnut or maple, open the first walnut and first maple options, compare their star ratings, and configure and add the one with the higher rating to the cart with a custom engraving.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the search bar in the header and type 'engraved phone stand', then press Enter to perform the search.
On the search results page, open the 'Material' filter and select both 'Walnut' and 'Maple'.
Set the maximum price filter to '40' so only phone stands priced at $40 or less are shown.
In the results list, click the first product that mentions 'Walnut' in its title or material, opening it in a new browser tab.
Return to the search results tab and click the first product that mentions 'Maple' in its title or material, opening it in another new browser tab.
Compare the star ratings visible on the two opened product tabs and stay on the tab whose product shows the higher star rating.
On the chosen product page, select the engraving style option labeled 'Minimal' from the style choices.
Locate the engraving text field and type 'Desk Buddy' as the personalization text.
Set the quantity field to '1' and click the 'Add to Cart' button on the selected product page.

tasks.name: Request a bulk quote for 50 engraved aluminum logo keychains with a $300 budget
tasks.description: Use the corporate orders section to locate an aluminum logo keychain, set the quantity to 50, and submit a bulk quote request form specifying a $300 budget and a 30-day timeline.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation item labeled 'Corporate & Bulk Orders'.
On the corporate orders page, select the 'Keychains & Accessories' category or section.
From the list of products, click the item titled 'Aluminum Logo Keychain' or the closest matching aluminum keychain product.
On the keychain product page, type '50' into the quantity field to indicate an order of fifty keychains.
Click the 'Request Bulk Quote' button located near the product details or pricing section.
In the quote request form, type 'Brightline Studios' into the 'Company Name' field.
In the budget or estimated budget field, enter '300' to indicate a $300 budget in USD.

In the timeline or needed-by dropdown, select the option that reads 'Need in 30 days', then type a short project description such as '50 aluminum keychains engraved with BRIGHTLINE on both sides for client gifts' into the project details text area.
Click the 'Submit Quote Request' button to send the bulk order inquiry.

tasks.name: Save a customized rustic wedding welcome sign (12 x 18 in) to the wishlist
tasks.description: Browse the Weddings occasion section for rustic welcome signs in size 12 x 18 in, pick a popular design, personalize it with specific names and date, choose a dark walnut finish, and add it to the wishlist instead of the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over or click 'Occasions' and then select 'Weddings' from the dropdown.
On the Weddings page, use the 'Product Type' filter to select 'Welcome Signs & Plaques'.
Open the 'Size' filter and choose the '12 x 18 in' size option.
Open the 'Style' or 'Theme' filter and select the 'Rustic' style.
Use the sort dropdown to select 'Most Popular', then in the resulting list click on the second product displayed.
On the product detail page, find the main text personalization field and type 'Welcome to the wedding of Emma & Noah'.
Locate the date field and type 'June 14, 2026' as the event date.
In the wood finish or color selector, choose the 'Dark Walnut' option.
Click the 'Add to Wishlist' button so that this customized sign is saved to the user's wishlist rather than added to the cart.

tasks.name: Find an anniversary gift under $40 with 4+ stars and free gift wrapping, then add it to the cart
tasks.description: Use the gift finder to locate an anniversary-appropriate engraved item priced under $40 with at least 4 stars and free gift wrapping, then personalize it with a specific message and add one unit to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the navigation link or button labeled 'Gift Finder'.
On the Gift Finder page, choose 'Anniversary' as the occasion from the available options.
Set the maximum price filter to '40', select a rating filter of '4 stars & up', and check the option labeled 'Free gift wrapping available'.
Use the sort dropdown to select 'Customer Rating: High to Low', then click the first product displayed in the filtered list.
On the selected product page, locate the engraving or message field and type 'To many more adventures together' as the personalization.
In the packaging or extras section, choose the option labeled 'Free Gift Wrap'.
Confirm that only one unit will be purchased by setting the quantity field to '1' if needed.
Select any required variant such as color or material if prompted, choosing the default or first available option.
Click the 'Add to Cart' button to add this anniversary gift to the shopping cart.

tasks.name: Order 3 engraved pens for same-day store pickup, each with a different name
tasks.description: Use the store pickup section to find a same-day pickup eligible engraved pen under $25 with 4+ stars near ZIP code 94103, then configure a quantity of 3 pens with three different engraved names and add them for pickup at the selected store.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the header link or menu option labeled 'Store Pickup'.
In the location or ZIP code field, type '94103' and select the first suggested store location from the results.
On the pickup-eligible products page, use the category filter to select 'Pens & Office'.
Set the maximum price filter to '25' and select a rating filter of '4 stars & up'.
From the list, click the first product that is marked or labeled as 'Same-day pickup'.
On the pen product page, set the quantity field to '3' so that three pens will be included in the order.
Locate the individual engraving fields (for example, Pen 1, Pen 2, Pen 3) and type 'Alex' for the first pen, 'Jordan' for the second pen, and 'Casey' for the third pen.
If an ink color option is available, select 'Black' as the ink color from the dropdown or swatches.
Click the button labeled 'Add for Pickup at Selected Store' to add the three customized pens to the order for local pickup.

tasks.name: Schedule a video-call design consultation for a large custom wall art project
tasks.description: Use the custom projects section to schedule a design consultation for a 36 x 24 in carved wall art piece, selecting 'Wall Art & Large Signs' as the project type, choosing a specific date and time, specifying a $400 budget in the description, and submitting the appointment request with contact details.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the main navigation item labeled 'Custom Projects'.
On the Custom Projects page, click the call-to-action button that says 'Schedule Design Consultation'.
In the consultation form, open the project type dropdown and select 'Wall Art & Large Signs'.
Use the date picker to select the appointment date 'April 15, 2026' and choose '2:00 PM' from the available time slots.
In the meeting format or consultation type section, select the 'Video Call' option.
In the project description text area, type a message such as 'I would like a 36 x 24 in carved wooden wall map of my city with street details, with a budget of $400.'
Fill in the name field with 'Taylor Morgan' and the email field with 'taylor.morgan@example.com'.
In the preferred contact method dropdown, select 'Email'.
Click the 'Submit Appointment Request' button to send the consultation request.
